headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Stock Could Be 44% Undervalued Despite A Fair Value Debate
summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) is back in focus after recent trading, with the stock closing at $58.14 as investors weigh its $26,647 million in revenue and $7,432 million in net income across diversified banking operations. See our latest analysis for U.S. Bancorp. Recent trading has added to a clear upswing, with U.S. Bancorp’s 1 month share price return of 9.08% contributing to a 7.81% year to date gain and a 1 year total shareholder return of 40.07%. This points to improving momentum as investors...
